text: A taxi driver was driving...
when a sleepy deaf person got busy
because she was late for her appointment.
He went downstairs,
called an Uber,
and the cab arrived.
He was getting his suitcase into the car,
while the taxi driver asked him where he was going.
The deaf closed the door and said:
Oh sorry, I'm deaf.
The taxi driver: Where are you going?
The deaf man told him to continue straight.
The taxi driver drove straight
and did not know what to do with his deaf passenger.
I saw it in the rearview mirror and continued driving...
"Now to the left"
OK, to the left.
He kept driving
and stopped at the red light.
I wait for people to pass.
The deaf man was very worried
because it was already late.
"Please, let's go, it's late, it's late"
Wait, wait, it's in red!
Lets go please!
The taxi driver obeyed
and followed the red.
The deaf man very worried because it was already late.
"Hey, if you get a red light, don't pay attention to it"
"You continue, because it's already too late"
At that moment a patrol car appears
and told him to pull over.
He leaned over and said: Hey, what happened?
The red light was passed.
"Oh yes, excuse me, my passenger is deaf"
He spoke to her and indeed, the deaf person was not listening to him.
"Well okay,
I'll take a bite"
He gave it to her and continued driving.
The deaf person was already very desperate
and asked him to change places.
The driver accepted and now the deaf man was driving.
And he ran all the red lights.
The driver was surprised that he missed the stops.
A policeman saw them
and followed them for a while.
And he said to him: Shore up!
And he shored up.
What happened?
"Oh, I'm deaf, excuse me"
And the policeman: Okay, continue.
The very surprised driver: Just because he's deaf!
I was arrested a moment ago and had to take a bite!
I will learn!
The deaf man arrived at his destination, paid the driver and left.
The driver learned from his experience.
Another ticket went up and he had to get to his destination fast.
He recalled the experience of his deaf passenger.
Started, drove and passed the stops.
A policeman stopped him and told him: I am deaf.
The policeman told him: OK, wait.
He went for a manual and began to sign to him.
And the driver: What?
"Sorry, talk to me"
And that's how the policeman realized that he was hearing.
